purpose: Skill and instruction documents for a personalized operator-agent focused on insurance sales automation, AHK/browser workflows, sales intelligence, compliance, and backend architecture.

skills.name: Hermes State-Machine Workflow Orchestrator
skills.description: Use when diagnosing, designing, or stabilizing multi-step workflows, quote flows, route transitions, UI state, recovery paths, or automation sequences.

skills.name: Hermes DOM and React Automation Diagnostician
skills.description: Use when browser automation is brittle because of selectors, React controlled components, hydration timing, disabled fields, synthetic events, iframes, shadow DOM, or UI enablement problems.

skills.name: Hermes Reliability and Observability Engineer
skills.description: Use when analyzing failures, logs, smoke tests, flaky automation, scan bundles, regressions, timing issues, or production readiness.

skills.name: Hermes Prompt-to-Code Architect
skills.description: Use when turning an idea into a Codex, Claude Code, or developer task with clear scope, contracts, tests, and rollback plan.

skills.name: Hermes Sales Intelligence and Follow-Up Strategist
skills.description: Use when handling leads, objections, follow-ups, bilingual outreach, call prep, close probability, ghosting, pricing sensitivity, or next-best-action decisions.

skills.name: Hermes Insurance Quote Operations Specialist
skills.description: Use when organizing quoted leads, quote data, bundle potential, bind readiness, docs/payment status, renewal timing, and insurance workflow operations.

skills.name: Hermes Compliance Guardrails
skills.description: Use when dealing with outreach, calls, texts, consent, DNC, TCPA, call recording, retention, disclosures, insurance compliance, or regulated workflow risk.

skills.name: Hermes Backend and Database Architect
skills.description: Use when designing durable systems, APIs, queues, schemas, auth, state storage, audit logs, SaaS migration, or replacing brittle desktop automation with services.

skills.name: Hermes AutoHotkey Orchestration Engineer
skills.description: Use when writing, refactoring, debugging, or planning AutoHotkey scripts, hotkeys, UI automation, clipboard workflows, window targeting, and script reliability.

skills.name: Hermes Notion CRM and Follow-Up Operator
skills.description: Use when managing quoted leads, Notion Kanban fields, follow-up dates, lead temperature, stage movement, and daily sales pipeline review.

skills.name: Hermes Memory and Context Hygiene Manager
skills.description: Use when deciding what Hermes should remember, what belongs only in the current conversation, and how to keep agent memory compact but useful.

skills.name: Hermes Decision Filter and Anti-Distraction Enforcer
skills.description: Use when evaluating new ideas, features, refactors, business moves, automations, purchases, or side quests that may distract from the main bottleneck.
